regional_cost_note: Scaffolding in Gisborne typically costs $2,200–$6,000 for a residential scaffold (erect plus 4 weeks). Commercial jobs are quoted at $25–$55/m² erected. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. Confirm whether the quote includes weekly hire after the initial period and dismantling costs.
